message:
web: Revert URL routing to use database id instead of transcriptId

Reverts the change from c4abfd2 that switched transcript URLs from using
the internal database id (short cuid2) to transcriptId (Claude Code's
session UUID). URLs now use short IDs like /app/logs/a6b541c4fg again.

The /s/$sessionId route still provides a way to access transcripts by
their Claude Code session ID via redirect.

- Revert getTranscript query to look up by id
- Revert all transcript links to use id in URLs
- Update e2e tests to expect database id format
- Use /s/ redirect route in upload tests for transcriptId lookups

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/7d954b77-bb7f-400c-bda6-31c4ed5239b4

files.patch:
@@ -92,7 +92,7 @@ function PrivateDetailComponent() {
                   </TableCell>
                   <TableCell className="text-right">
                     <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" asChild>
-                      <Link to="/app/logs/$id" params={{ id: transcript.transcriptId }}>
+                      <Link to="/app/logs/$id" params={{ id: transcript.id }}>
                         View
                       </Link>
                     </Button>

@@ -92,7 +92,7 @@ function RepoDetailComponent() {
                   </TableCell>
                   <TableCell className="text-right">
                     <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" asChild>
-                      <Link to="/app/logs/$id" params={{ id: transcript.transcriptId }}>
+                      <Link to="/app/logs/$id" params={{ id: transcript.id }}>
                         View
                       </Link>
                     </Button>
